  "claims": [
    "The Gun Violence Restraining Order (GVRO) law can be improved to be a more efficient and reliable tool for law enforcement.",
    "Local law enforcement agencies can be empowered to reduce the backlog of armed prohibited persons.",
    "Fewer than 200 Gun Violence Restraining Orders (GVROs) were issued in the first two years the law was in effect.",
    "California law prohibits individuals convicted of a felony or violent misdemeanor, as well as those experiencing mental health crises or narcotics addiction, from possessing firearms.",
